customErrors.description: Netsuite Consulting Project fields are mandatory
customErrors.name: Custom_Error_Netsuite_Consulting_Project_fields_are_mandatory
customErrors.label: Custom Error Netsuite Consulting Project fields are mandatory

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: The following Netsuite Consulting Project fields are mandatory: Delivery Owner, Contracts, Consultants Allocated, Billing Type, New or Extension, Customer Invoicing Contact, Start Date.

rules.name: Netsuite_Consulting_Project_fields_are_mandatory

rightValue.stringValue: The following Netsuite Consulting Project fields are mandatory: Delivery Owner, Contracts, Consultants Allocated, Billing Type, New or Extension, Customer Invoicing Contact, Start Date

rules.label: Netsuite Consulting Project fields are mandatory

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Stage_moved_to_Closed_Won
decisions.label: Stage moved to Closed Won or order

Flow.description: Update the relevant "stage date changed" fields when stage is changed (on modification of the opp only)

formulas.name: formula_TRUE_myRule_1
formulas.expression: (ISPICKVAL({!$Record.StageName} ,"Closed won - awaiting approval") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.StageName},"Order" )) && NOT(ISCHANGED({!$Record.StageName})) && ISCHANGED({!$Record.CloseDate} )

Flow.label: Opportunity Stage change date (Edit)
